payload.title: Demote scope.db to a rebuildable cache; events dir is record
payload.description:
Demote scope.db to a disposable local cache and make .scope/events/ the unit of record.

## Work
- scope.db/-wal/-shm gitignored everywhere (ship .scope/.gitignore); guard against a tracked db.
- Auto-rebuild the cache from events on startup when missing or when its applied count lags the event dir.
- Document: "the database is a cache; delete it anytime, it rebuilds from .scope/events/."

## Acceptance
- rm .scope/scope.db* followed by any scope command transparently rebuilds and shows the correct board.
